Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi Bus 390 Timings - Al Ain to Al Shwaib (Souq)

May 7, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The Abu Dhabi public transportation system offers a convenient and affordable way to travel, and Bus 390 is a perfect example of this. Connecting Al Ain Bus Station to Al Shwaib (Souq), this route serves both residents and visitors, providing access to essential services and attractions along the way.

Operational Details

Bus 390 operates four times a day, ensuring consistent service for travelers. Below are the key timings for Bus 390 departing from both Al Ain Bus Station and Al Shwaib (Souq):

From Al Ain From Al Shwaib (Souq)
08:00 10:00
12:00 14:00
16:00 18:00
20:00 22:00

Download PDF Bus 390

Bus 390 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link for the 390 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Payments for Bus 390 can be made using the Hafilat Card, Abu Dhabi’s cashless payment system. The fare is AED 2 for travel within one zone, with additional charges of AED 0.05 per kilometer. Passengers can easily top up their Hafilat cards online or at kiosks located throughout the city for a seamless travel experience.

Route Overview

  1. Al Ain Bus Station The central hub for passengers beginning their journey.

  2. Department of Public Health A key stop providing essential health services.

  3. Al Kharais / Al Ain Gift Markets A vibrant marketplace for shopping and local souvenirs.

  4. Al Rahma Medical Center / Al Qattara Oasis East Access point for medical assistance.

  5. Al Ain School Addressing the educational requirements of the local community.

  6. Wedding Hall A popular venue for various celebrations and events.

  7. Al Foa’a Police Station Ensuring safety and security for residents.

  8. ADNOC A convenient stop for refueling services.

  9. Al Hayer Police Station Serving law enforcement needs in the area.

10.

  1. Hamad Mutawa Al Ketbi Mosque Another notable mosque enhancing the area’s spiritual landscape.

  2. Al Shuwaib Bridge An important connection point between regions in Al Ain.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Al Shwaib Park A recreational area perfect for family outings and leisure activities.

  2. Al Shwaib Souq The final stop, featuring a bustling market filled with diverse goods and local products.

Accessibility and Services

The buses feature:

  • Ramps for wheelchair access.

  • Designated seating for individuals requiring assistance.
  • Audio-visual aids for passengers with hearing or vision impairments.

This ensures that Bus 390 is an inclusive choice for all commuters.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

  • Al Rahma Medical Center A vital healthcare facility in the area, underscoring the importance of community health.

  • Al Shwaib Park A scenic recreational area perfect for family outings and leisurely activities, featuring playgrounds and picnic spots.

These attractions turn a journey on Bus 390 into an opportunity to experience the cultural and recreational offerings of Al Ain.

Journey Experience

On a recent trip on Bus 390 from Al Ain to Al Shwaib (Souq), travelers experienced a captivating journey through both urban and rural landscapes. Departing from Al Ain Bus Station, the bus stopped at notable spots like the lively Al Kharais Gift Markets and the picturesque Al Shwaib Park, ideal for family outings.

Overall, it was a delightful exploration of Al Ain’s hidden gems.

Travel Tips for Bus 390

  • Plan Ahead: Check the bus timings to avoid unnecessary waiting, especially during peak hours.

  • Use the Hafilat Smart Card: This allows for quick, cashless payment on all Abu Dhabi buses.
  • Monitor Bus Updates: Use the AD Mobility app for real-time updates and schedules to optimize your journey.
  • Explore the Souq: Make sure to allocate time to visit Al Shwaib Souq for a taste of local culture and shopping.

Bus 390 offers a dependable and convenient travel option from Al Ain to Al Shwaib (Souq). With its regular service, user-friendly design, and key stops, this route caters to residents, workers, and visitors.

Whether you’re shopping at local markets, visiting friends and family, or discovering the area’s attractions, Bus 390 guarantees a smooth and enjoyable ride through Abu Dhabi’s vibrant landscape. Take the opportunity to immerse yourself in the local culture along the way! Don’t forget to explore the full range of bus routes available in Abu Dhabi!

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: May 7, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
